texto: A man has to have something he can put faith in. Can't you see that? What I want is someone that will love me
autor: she would have me and I her. Otherwise a man may just go hang himself
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de she would have me and I her. Otherwise a man may just go hang himself que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “A man has to have something he can put faith in. Can't you see that? What I want is someone that …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, erich-maria-remarque, the-road-back, com foco em viagem e the-road-back.
